title: Prince of Vibe Code
description:
The Prince of Vibe Code is an incremental game where you become the most successful game developer. 

Key Features:

- Create games with just a few clicks

- Click to fix bugs

- Follow the conversation and enjoy the story

- Play and sell your games

- Publish your games

- Get Sales Prediction 

- Earn income from every game you've ever shipped

- Lifestyle Shop 

 

- Gain followers and turn them into loyal customers

- Sell Items 

- 44 Playable Games

- Earn income from playing your games

- Build a game dev empire one release at a time

- Continuous Revenue Stream

- Idle Earnings and Offline Progress

- Multiple Rounds (Prestige Reset)

- You win when you have $1,000,000,000,000 and seven billion followers.
description_short: An incremental game where you become the most successful game developer. Create and play 44 games with just a few clicks, read the chat and follow the story, sell your games, and grow your fanbase. You win when you have $1,000,000,000,000 and 7 billion followers.
